active_goal: Improve MemoryOS Lite v3 into a benchmark-usable Letta-style agent memory system for LongMemEval and LoCoMo, without demo-only phase completion, without hiding case-level regressions, and without enabling the v3 kernel by default.
verification_commands: No fresh Phase 18 tests, evals, uv, pytest, ruff, or public eval commands were run because review_eval_decision.scope=not_applicable for a non-behavioral governance phase.
Read-only evidence inspection of accepted Phase 8 LongMemEval 50 and LoCoMo 50 reports.
Read-only evidence inspection of accepted Phase 17 LoCoMo r3 baseline, opt-in kernel repair-smoke report, and repair-smoke summary.
Read-only review of git diff confirmed no prohibited product, docs, tests, benchmark data, eval report, or blueprint changes.

longmemeval.pass_fail: accepted Phase 8 full-chain evidence: 47 pass / 3 fail; no Phase 18 candidate run

locomo.pass_fail: accepted Phase 8 full-chain evidence: 30 pass / 20 fail; accepted Phase 17 r3 same-slice diagnostic evidence: baseline 8 pass / 2 fail and repair smoke 8 pass / 2 fail

review_eval_decision.reason: Phase 18 EXECUTE is governance-only and non-behavioral. It changed no MemoryOS answer/retrieval/kernel path, product code, tests, docs, benchmark data, eval reports, or blueprint content.

longmemeval.reason: No product behavior changed and this route is not a promotion or eval-expansion attempt.

locomo.reason: No product behavior changed and this route is not a promotion or eval-expansion attempt.
